---
title: "Julia Elizabeth Marshall"
---

## Julia Elizabeth Marshall

**Dates:** (b. 1848/9)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society

### Biography

A Gosling as ‘Mayfly’ in December 1876, she was daughter of the Rev. Edward Marshall (ne Marshall-Hacker, 1815-1899) former fellow of Corpus Christi and squire of Sandford, who published extensively on theology and local history [<i>Alumni Oxonienses</i>; Marshall, <i>Parish of Sandford</i>;  1881 census, BBI]

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 3d 1877 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
